about.description-1: We connect Kepulauan Sula's rich ocean harvest with partners around the world, supplying premium tuna with sustainable, traceable practices.
about.description-2: From sourcing to export, our team keeps quality, safety, and timely delivery at the center of every shipment.

footer.social-description: Follow our journey as we grow Indonesia's seafood exports and strengthen partnerships across the globe.
footer.copyright: © Copyright 2025 PT Sanana Pelangi. All rights reserved.

hero-section.title: Connecting Kepulauan Sula's Ocean Harvest to Every Market
hero-section.description: We supply fresh and processed tuna that meets international standards. Our focus is delivering quality products with care and precision.
